Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 10th, 2009 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: September 22nd, 2009 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for pervasive language, graphic nudity, drug use, sexual content and violence
Running Time: 86 minutes
Plot point: Mental Illness, Police Detective, Prescription Drug Abuse, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Security Guard, Sex Crimes
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
